MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON AUG-22-2023 IN 206 -- APPEARANCES BY MARIA PAPPAS-RAJOTTE, ESQ. (VIA COURTCALL) FOR PLAINTIFFS; LUCIA LI, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANTS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AND MICHELLE LIDDICOET -- PLAINTIFF'S STIPULATED MOTION FOR ORDER CONTINUING THE TRIAL AND ALL RELATED DEADLINES IS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE OF 10/30/23 IS CONTINUED TO 1/22/24 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. ALL PRETRIAL DEADLINES AND DISCOVERY TO FOLLOW THE NEW TRIAL DATE AS REFLECTED ON THE ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. THERE WILL BE NO FURTHER CONTINUANCE OF THE TRIAL DATE. ALL PARTIES MUST EMAIL DEPT. 206 NO LATER THAN SIX WEEKS BEFORE THE TRIAL DATE TO SET A MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WITH THE COURT. JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
